issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Blackbeard Pirates} type using LeaderHasType, not HasCardOnBoard. HasCardOnBoard checks for cards on the board, not leader type.
Missing passive effects: Character gains [Blocker] keyword and +1 cost for every 4 cards in trash. Only the [On Play] Trash action is implemented.

Missing Blocker keyword grant effect that should be conditional on Leader type and scale with trash count. This requires a separate passive/static effect with PowerBoost action based on TrashCount condition.
